'''Boren Tascl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cilpar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was a [[Gender/Legends|man]] of average build, with a goatee and long mustache.

==Biography==
According to the Cilpar resistance leader [[Elscol Loro]], Moff Tascl was negotiating to hand over Imperial facilities to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] when news of the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] arrived. He then began attacking the local resistance. Tascl was dressed like an Imperial [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]]. Tascl personally lead a ground [[Mission to Cilpar|attack]] on [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and their resistance allies from an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]], but was eventually defeated and captured when his base was overrun.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Boren" is [[Wikipedia:Dutch|Dutch]] for the verb "drill".
